channel.title: Aws on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Aws on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer

item.title: Under Fire: What a Real DDoS Attack Looks Like and How We Fought Back
item.description: What a real DDoS attack looks like up close, how we responded in real time at Privyr, the tools that helped us survive 30 hours of it, and the product change we shipped right after.
